description: A mesh collider allows for making a 1:1 collider of the given ``Mesh``.

fields.Mesh: The mesh to make a collision shape made of groups of polygons out of.
fields.ActualSpeculativeMargin: Essentially the room for error on the collisions for this collider.

methods.ConvexDecomposition: Called when the create convex hull decomposition button is touched.
methods.ReplaceWithBox: Called when the replace with box collider button is touched.

usage: General practice is to use mesh colliders very sparingly.
